{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Otokuni-nimasuo Hoikatsuchino Shrine'''|乙訓坐火雷神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
